title: NotebookLM is now bigger than Gemini
summary: NotebookLM has surpassed Google Gemini in search interest. The tool's core strength is grounding answers in user-provided documents across multiple formats, avoiding hallucinations. It is recommended when accuracy and source verification are priorities.
